$comment: Agent Path Forge distribution registry — bundled golden skills /inherit can resolve by name. source is relative to the plugin root.

skills.name: review
skills.description: 对当前改动做代码审查(确定性取 diff + LLM 评审)

skills.name: commit
skills.description: 把已暂存的改动写成一条规范的提交信息(确定性取暂存区 + LLM 生成)

skills.name: pr-description
skills.description: 把本分支相对基线的提交与改动汇总成 PR 描述(确定性取 log/diffstat + LLM 综述)

skills.name: skill-design
skills.description: 把一个想法设计成基因合规的技能(流程/方法论型,无确定性脚本)
